name: Frozen Lady Heath Dessert
recipeInstructions:
1. Line the bottom and sides of an 8-inch springform pan with ladyfingers, cutting to fit.
2. Dissolve coffee in boiling water.
3. Cool the dissolved coffee mixture.
4. Crush 4 Heath Bars carefully, avoiding smashing them.
5. Combine the crushed Heath Bars with the coffee and softened ice cream.
6. Spoon the mixture into the prepared pan and freeze until firm.
7. Whip the cream and cream de cacao until stiff.
8. Spread the whipped topping over the frozen ice cream mixture.
9. Crush the remaining Heath Bars and sprinkle over the whipped cream layer.
10. Cover with foil and freeze until firm.
11. Cut into wedges to serve.
